domains.name: Video Generation (HWAR)
domains.description: Core domain for AI-powered video generation using AES (Attention-Emotion-Solution) framework

services.name: Scenario Generation Service
services.responsibility: Generate multiple scenario concepts using AI with function calling
outputs: Array of scenarios with title, description, AES score, hook strength, emotional curve, scenes
businessRules: Must generate 3-5 scenario concepts per request
Each scenario must follow AES framework: HOOK → BUILD → PAYOFF → RESOLUTION
Total duration should be 15-20 seconds per scenario
AES scores must reflect viral potential (0-100)
Hook strength must reflect immediate engagement (0-100)
If MINIMAX_API_KEY not set, return mock scenarios for development

services.name: Keyframe Generation Orchestration
services.responsibility: Create jobs for generating first and last frame of each scene
businessRules: Must create 2 assets per scene (first frame, last frame)
Prompts must include scene description, phase, and aspect ratio
Must include character information if available in project meta
Update project status to 'processing' after job creation
Store keyframeGenerationStartedAt timestamp in project meta

services.name: Animation Generation Orchestration
services.responsibility: Create jobs for generating videos from keyframe pairs
businessRules: All keyframes must have status='completed' before animation can start
Must verify first/last frame pairs exist for all scenes
Scene description must include camera commands if available
Update project status to 'processing' after job creation
Store animationStartedAt timestamp in project meta

steps.name: Project Creation
process: Validate project details (title, ratio, language, AI models)
Resolve AI model IDs (use provided or fetch defaults)
Fetch additional context if needed (preset/trend data)
Call MiniMax-M2 with function calling for scenario generation
Insert project into database with scenarios in meta field

steps.name: Scenario Selection
steps.trigger: User navigates to project detail page
process: Display all generated scenarios with AES scores

steps.name: Keyframe Generation
process: Create asset records for first/last frames per scene

steps.name: Keyframe Worker Processing
process: Atomic job capture with FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
Generate image using AI model (Gemini by default)
Update asset record with storage URL
steps.polling: Project detail page polls for asset updates every 3 seconds

steps.name: Animation Generation
process: Create animation_job_queue entries for each scene

steps.name: Animation Worker Processing
process: Atomic job capture with FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
Submit to MiniMax HALU API for video generation

invariants: Project must have at least 1 scenario before keyframe generation
Scenario must be selected before keyframe generation
All keyframes must be completed before animation generation
Asset storage_url must be valid R2 key
Job status transitions: pending → processing → completed/failed (no backwards)

domains.name: Library Management
domains.description: Manage reusable assets for video generation

services.name: Story Template Service
services.responsibility: CRUD operations for story templates with beats
businessRules: Template must have at least 1 beat
Beats must have unique order numbers within template
Total duration = sum of all beat durations
Phase must be one of: HOOK, BUILD, PAYOFF, RESOLUTION

services.name: Character Service
businessRules: Character must have name
Reference images must be valid URLs or R2 keys
Style presets stored as JSONB for flexibility

services.name: AI Models Service
businessRules: Each model type should have exactly 1 default model
Only enabled models can be selected
Model config stored as JSONB for provider-specific settings

domains.name: Content Ingestion & Analysis
domains.description: YouTube video ingestion and emotional architecture analysis

services.name: Ingest Service
businessRules: Must validate YouTube API key before search
Store video metadata in database
Create ingest job for async processing

services.name: Analysis Service
services.responsibility: Analyze videos using Gemini multimodal AI
businessRules: Extract AES framework elements (Attention, Emotion, Solution)
Identify emotional curve throughout video
Store analysis results in structured format

sharedModules.name: Database Client
sharedModules.description: Centralized Drizzle ORM client with schema definitions

sharedModules.name: HALU Client
sharedModules.description: MiniMax HALU API client for text generation with function calling and video generation

sharedModules.name: Storage Client
sharedModules.description: Cloudflare R2 / AWS S3 client for media storage

sharedModules.name: Core Domain Schemas
sharedModules.description: Shared validation schemas for domain entities

sharedModules.name: Shared Types
sharedModules.description: Shared type definitions used across packages
sharedModules.note: Includes HWAR-specific types in separate export

utils.name: retryFetch
utils.description: Retry wrapper for external API calls with exponential backoff

criticalPaths.name: Project Creation to Keyframe Generation
criticalPaths.testCoverage: Partial (unit tests exist for handlers, no E2E tests)
